response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ development experience on Windows, which is critical for this role. Domain expertise in capital markets or fixed income is also missing, and there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle proficiency. While the candidate demonstrates strong technical versatility, the misalignment with core requirements significantly reduces overall fit.
strengths: Strong general software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to work in full-stack and backend roles with performance considerations
Active open-source contributions and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No evidence of mandatory C++ development on Windows platform (core requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
No clear SQL Server or Oracle experience mentioned (key requirement)
